title: Huberia annulata

This plant is part of the order Myrtales and is closely related to other species within the same family. The classification of H. annulata is further divided into several subcategories, including its genus, species, and family. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, H. annulata is also known as a member of the tarflower or tropical soneria family.

The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
